entries.title: Native Android SDK Update
entries.description: Updated the native Android SDK to version 2.13.4.

entries.title: Cross-Platform Appearance Support
entries.description: Introduced support for cross-platform appearance configuration.

entries.title: Android Font Resolution
entries.description: Improved font name resolution on Android to automatically normalize font names.

entries.title: Platform-Specific Appearance Configuration
entries.description: Platform-specific appearance configurations now take priority over shared configurations.

entries.title: Native Android SDK Version Update
entries.description: Updated the native Android SDK dependency to the latest version. No API changes required.

entries.title: Native Android SDK Version Update
entries.description: Updated the native Android SDK dependency to the latest version. No API changes required.

entries.title: Hindi, Bengali, Malayalam Support
entries.description: Added support for Hindi, Bengali, and Malayalam languages. No additional configuration is required to enable these languages.

entries.title: Native SDK Versions Update
entries.description: Updated the native Android and iOS SDK dependencies to their latest versions. No API changes required.
